description: Use this API to change the value of a VAR of a designated induction machine model at a specified machine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr = change_immod_var(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)
python_syntax: ierr = change_immod_var(ibus, id, name, j, rdata)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Induction machine bus number. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Induction machine identifier. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: j
parameters.description: Var number to change relative to the start of the block of vars assigned to this model (1 for var(j), 2 for var(j+1), etc.). (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: rdata
parameters.description: New var value. (input; unchanged by default).

error_codes.description: No model at this induction machine.
model at this machine is aaa not NAME.
no input VARs used in model NAME.
VAR number outside of the VAR range of this model.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
